steps.title: Test the proposed values directly
steps.content: The Roman numerals give the only values we need to check in the equation $x-a=(x-a)(x-24)$. Direct substitution is faster than factoring the whole equation.

steps.title: Check each statement
steps.content:
• I: $x=a$. Left side: $a-a=0$. Right side: $(a-a)(a-24)=0$. True.
  • II: $x=24$. Left side: $24-a$. Right side: $(24-a)(24-24)=0$. Since $a\gt 25$, $24-a\ne0$, so false.
  • III: $x=25$. Left side: $25-a$. Right side: $(25-a)(25-24)=25-a$. True.

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content: Only statements I and III must be true. That confirms B.
